-- ˛éŐŇ˛˘ÉľłýË÷ŇýŁ¨ÇëĚć»»ÎŞÄăĘµĽĘµÄË÷ŇýĂűŁ©
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS your_index_name;

-- Čçąű·ÇŇŞ˝¨Ë÷ŇýŁ¬ÍĆĽöĘąÓĂ HNSWŁ¨ĐÔÄÜ¸üşĂÇŇ¸üÎČ¶¨Ł©
CREATE INDEX ON enterprise_knowledge USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops);



-- ĽŮÉčË÷ŇýĂűĘÇ enterprise_knowledge_embedding_idx
DROP INDEX enterprise_knowledge_embedding_idx;

DROP INDEX IF EXISTS enterprise_knowledge_embedding_idx;


¸řÄăµÄ×¨Ňµ˝¨ŇéŁ¨±ÜĂâĎÂ´ÎÔŮµôżÓŁ©
ĐˇąćÄŁĘýľÝ˛»˝¨Ë÷ŇýŁşČçąűÄăµÄĘýľÝÁżÔÚ 1000 ĚőŇÔĎÂŁ¬ĆäĘµÍęČ«˛»ĐčŇŞ˝¨Á˘ĎňÁżË÷ŇýˇŁ±©Á¦Č«±íÉ¨ĂčŁ¨Exact SearchŁ©ÔÚĽ¸şÁĂëÄÚľÍÄÜÍęłÉŁ¬¶řÇŇ˝áąűÓŔÔ¶ĘÇ 100% ×ĽČ·µÄˇŁ

ŃˇÔń HNSW Ë÷ŇýŁşČçąűÄăĘýľÝÁżżŞĘĽ±ä´óŁ¬˝¨ŇéÓĹĎČĘąÓĂ HNSW ¶ř˛»ĘÇ IVFFlatˇŁHNSW ËäČ»˝¨Á˘Âýˇ˘ŐĽżŐĽä´óŁ¬µ«ÔÚĘýľÝ¶ŻĚ¬ÔöÉľşóµÄ˛éŃŻÎČ¶¨ĐÔŇŞşĂµĂ¶ŕˇŁ

ĘąÓĂ OpenAI Embedding Ę±µÄ×˘ŇâµăŁşĽČČ»ÄăĘąÓĂµÄĘÇ text-embedding-3-small ÄŁĐÍŁ¬ËüµÄĘäłöÎ¬¶ČąĚ¶¨ĘÇ 1536ˇŁ˝¨Á˘Ë÷ŇýĘ±Ň»¶¨ŇŞČ·±Ł˛Ů×÷·űĘÇ vector_cosine_opsŁ¬ŇňÎŞÓŕĎŇĎŕËĆ¶ČŁ¨Cosine SimilarityŁ©ĘÇŐâŔŕÄŁĐÍµÄ±ę×ĽşâÁż·˝Ę˝ˇŁ



-- ´´˝¨ĐÂ±íŁ¬×¨ĂĹ´ć·Ĺ°˘ŔďÔĆ text-embedding-v3 ÉúłÉµÄĎňÁż
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1536
(
    id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('enterprise_knowledge_1536_id_seq'::regclass),
    summary character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    content text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    embedding vector(1536), -- °˘ŔďÔĆ text-embedding-v3 Í¬ŃůĘÇ 1536 Î¬
    source_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    source_url character varying(500) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    doc_id character varying(100) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    chunk_index integer,
    category character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    permission_level integer DEFAULT 0,
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    create_time timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    update_time timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1536_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

ALTER TABLE public.enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1536 OWNER to postgres;

-- ÎŞĐÂ±í´´˝¨Ë÷ŇýŇÔĚá¸ßĽěË÷ËŮ¶Č
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_category_qwen_1536
    ON public.enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1536 USING btree (category ASC NULLS LAST);




-- Table: public.enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1024

-- DROP TABLE IF EXISTS public.enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1024;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1024
(
   id character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    category character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    summary character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    content text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
   
    source_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    
    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    create_time timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   embedding vector(1024),
    CONSTRAINT enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1024_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

TABLESPACE pg_default;

ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS public.enterprise_knowledge_qwen_1024
    OWNER to postgres;
